title: Cheryl's Curried Chicken Salad
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise, fresh lemon juice, salt, curry powder, and fresh ground pepper to make the curry dressing.
In a larger bowl, place the diced cooked chicken breast and diced celery.
Add the dressing to the chicken and celery mixture and stir well.
Serve on a platter topped with toasted, slivered almonds.
notes: Cheryl gave this recipe in the early 1990s and it became a staple for baby and bridal showers.
A massive amount was made for Tiffany Valentine's wedding reception, served in mini croissants.
Can be served as a salad with greens, avocado slices, and fresh tomatoes.
Can be served as a salad with greens, fresh fruit (grapes, pineapple, strawberries, cantaloupe) and avocado.
Can be served in croissants with avocado and sliced iceberg lettuce.
Can be served in butter lettuce cups.
Best Foods mayonnaise is the preferred brand.
Omit almonds if serving to Grant.
